form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming 7th of 10 at Armidale Cl1-Sw on March 13 over 1900m, slow going 9 len behind Rock The Machine with 59kg at $9. Second-up ran last of 7 at Wyong Cl1-Sw on March 28 over 2100m, on a slow track; 20 len behind Autumn Winter with 59kg at $21. Needs to go to another level to match these.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 7 at Gosford Bm64 on April 2 over 2100m, 2.75 len behind Aussie Nation carrying 55kg at $31. Slow to begin.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 400m, steadied when placed close to the heels of Ongatiti.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. The start before that 6th of 8 at Taree Bm66 on March 10 over 2000m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Fighting Magnus carrying 56kg at $21. Not far away last start and stays in the mix.
